summary: Soundboard recording of a lively NYE 1983 show with clear drums and a standout Good Night Irene, minor left‑channel click noted by some listeners.
review: The performance captures the high‑energy New Year’s Eve vibe of late‑80s Dead shows, highlighted by an electrifying Good Night Irene that many reviewers call spectacular. The soundboard source is generally clean with well‑defined bass drum, though a few listeners hear a rhythmic click in the left channel. Overall the recording is listenable and the show is fondly remembered.

ai_rating.rationale: Eight reviews, most rating 4‑5 stars and praising both the music and audio quality; only one moderate (3‑star) complaint about a click, yielding an overall strong positive assessment.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Generally clear and well balanced; bass drum is tight and defined. A few listeners report a rhythmic clicking sound in the left speaker, interpreted by some as part of the drum kit.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Three‑set NYE marathon with an upbeat first set, a tight quick third set and a memorable Good Night Irene that caps the night; overall flow described as hot, energetic and enjoyable.

band_member_comments.Jerry: His guitar work is praised as "grinning" notes during Good Night Irene.
band_member_comments.Drums: Clicking sound noted by some listeners but identified as the bass drum; drumming described as well defined and tight.
